'''bajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:boatward|boatward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:boatward|boatward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bajate|bajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bajatesher|bajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajatesherĂ«m|bajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bajatero|bajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bajateshĂ«|bajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajateshĂ«m|bajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibajatero|gokibajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibajateshĂ«|gokibajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajateshĂ«m|gokibajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobajankerom|gobajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobajankeshĂ«|gobajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajankeshĂ«m|gobajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobajankeya|gobajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bajaterom|bajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajatemu|bajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bajateya|bajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibajaterom|gokibajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajatemu|gokibajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibajateya|gokibajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bajajate|bajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bajajatesher|bajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajajatesherĂ«m|bajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bajajatero|bajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bajajateshĂ«|bajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajajateshĂ«m|bajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibajajatero|gokibajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibajajateshĂ«|gokibajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajajateshĂ«m|gokibajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobajajankerom|gobajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobajajankeshĂ«|gobajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajajankeshĂ«m|gobajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobajajankeya|gobajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bajajaterom|bajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajajatemu|bajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bajajateya|bajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibajajaterom|gokibajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajajatemu|gokibajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibajajateya|gokibajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠte|bĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠtesher|bĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠtero|bĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠtero|gokibĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠterom|bĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠtemu|bĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠjĂŠteya|bĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠterom|gokibĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠjĂŠteya|gokibĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafjafte|bafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafjaftesher|bafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafjaftesherĂ«m|bafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafjaftero|bafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafjafteshĂ«|bafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafjafteshĂ«m|bafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafjaftero|gokibafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafjafteshĂ«|gokibafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafjafteshĂ«m|gokibafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafjafnkerom|gobafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafjafnkeshĂ«|gobafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafjafnkeshĂ«m|gobafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafjafnkeya|gobafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafjafterom|bafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafjaftemu|bafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafjafteya|bafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafjafterom|gokibafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafjaftemu|gokibafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafjafteya|gokibafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
